title: Reporting/exporting to PDF - View the issue, updates, and pictures in order
excerpt: I’d love to be able to export out a PDF that has the issue/tasks, a few bits of information, any updates bulleted below it, and the pictures attached. I want to be able to share issues management with others not in monda…

posts.author: bmeeee (Branden Etheridge)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d love to be able to export out a PDF that has the issue/tasks, a few bits of information, any updates bulleted below it, and the pictures attached. I want to be able to share issues management with others not in monday.
thank you!

posts.author: johannesgeyer (Johannes Geyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bmeeee ,

What about sending an automated PDF report every day/week, etc.?
With our app PDF Report Generator, you can create PDF reports and send them via email.

You can use the report builder to create your own layout for the PDF, or if you need more flexibility, create a docx template. The app uses Word templates with placeholders. So you can specify which columns you want to export and create your own design. You can also use tables inside the Word template to reproduce the look of monday or create your own version.
https://www.pdfreportgenerator.com/help/template/

As a starting point, you can also use one of the pre-made templates from our Template Gallery.

SingleProject800×562 30.9 KB

It’s also possible to create a monday automation so that the report is automatically send via email every day / week / month.

If you need more advanced features like QR codes or custom email templates, try DocExport PDF Generator .

Both apps work with formulas, mirror-columns, images, Charts and so on.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us: support@towerapps.com

posts.author: JenefaJ (Jenefa)
posts.cookedHtml:
With The PDF Maker, you can design your own PDF layout using placeholders. You simply map whatever you want — text fields, updates, tables, even images — and it pulls that data directly from your Monday board.

So if you want a section with the issue/task details, a few key fields, all updates listed as bullet points, and any images attached — you can set that up exactly how you want it.

Once done, every PDF generated will follow that structure. Super handy for issue tracking or client reports where only certain parts of the data need to be shared.

Please view the support article, we can have a quick 1 on 1 meet to discuss your requirement if needed.

help.thepdfmaker.com

Automate Documents with the Monday App - Full Guide | The PDF Maker Help Center

Master document automation using the Monday app and PDF Maker. Streamline workflows and enhance productivity by effortlessly generating PDFs directly from Monday.com.

posts.author: Flowtech (Flowtech Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Branden,

it is possible to create a PDF export that includes the issue details, key information, updates, and even attached images.

You might want to look into DocCreate, a powerful app available in the Monday Apps Marketplace. With DocCreate, you can:

  • Design a custom PDF template to show issue/task details
  • Include specific columns and item updates
  • Automatically pull in file column images (like screenshots or photos)
  • Export everything into a neatly formatted PDF you can share with external stakeholders

It’s a great solution for reporting or managing issues outside of Monday while keeping everything visually organized.

Watch it in action:
See the feature demo on YouTube

Ready to try it? Install DocCreate here:
Install DocCreate on monday.com

Happy to help further if you need setup tips!
